type: verify correctness + verify claims + acceptance verification
title: Final independent verification against MVP acceptance criteria

do_not_read: other directories in ~/dev unless explicitly referenced

scope: Last verification task. Determine whether the objective is actually achieved.
goals: Run the full test suite and relevant static checks.
Check each MVP acceptance criterion from the plan and mark pass/fail/partial with evidence.
Check quality gates from the plan.
Verify no client imports provider-specific code.
Verify provider switching from mock to pi requires no client changes.
Verify docs accurately describe limitations and smoke results.
non_goals: Do not make implementation changes unless they are tiny documentation corrections; spawn fix tasks for real defects.
success_criteria: If objective is not achieved, list concrete blocker/fix tasks.
If objective is achieved, state that the MVP is working and cite commands/evidence.
